script: A=/home/azureuser/.aixa-bot/activities.jsonl; O=/home/azureuser/.aixa-bot/outbound.jsonl; echo '===== ALL activity from today since 16:00 UTC (9 AM PDT) =====' && jq -c 'select(.ts >= "2026-05-07T16:00:00") | {ts, body_summary: ((.body|fromjson) | {type, conv_type: .conversation.conversationType, conv_id: .conversation.id, from_aad: .from.aadObjectId, from_name: .from.name, text: (.text // "")[:60], has_mention: (.entities|map(select(.type=="mention"))|length>0), mention_id: (.entities|map(select(.type=="mention"))[0].mentioned.id // "none")})}' $A 2>&1 | tail -10 && echo && echo '===== ALL outbound today =====' && jq -c 'select(.ts >= "2026-05-07T09:00:00")' $O 2>&1 | tail -10 && echo && echo '===== Total activities + outbound counts =====' && echo "activities: $(wc -l < $A)" && echo "outbound:   $(wc -l < $O)" && echo && echo '===== Responder errors (full) =====' && cat /home/azureuser/.aixa-bot/responder-errors.log && echo && echo '===== Recent debug log =====' && tail -15 /home/azureuser/.aixa-bot/responder-debug.log && echo && echo '===== Service uptime =====' && systemctl show aixa-responder.service -p ActiveEnterTimestamp --value && systemctl show aixa-bot.service -p ActiveEnterTimestamp --value
